name: Chronograph Oyster Gold Watch
description: An exquisite automatic watch in 18k yellow gold finish, featuring a signature black dial, tachymeter bezel, and oysterlink bracelet.

name: Minimalist Rose-Gold Timepiece
description: Ultra-thin watch featuring a polished rose-gold case, clean eggshell dial, and an interchangeable Italian leather strap.

name: Skeleton Automatic Mechanical Watch
description: Admire the mechanical artistry of this self-winding skeleton watch. Features a sapphire crystal glass and gunmetal bezel.

name: Classic Steel Dress Watch
description: A refined watch in brushed surgical-grade stainless steel. Powered by a highly accurate Swiss quartz movement.

name: Noir Leather Strap Watch
description: An all-black watch with matte casing, black sunray dial, and full-grain black leather strap. Peak stealth luxury.

name: Platinum Tourbillon Masterpiece
description: A grand complication tourbillon encased in solid platinum. Hand-assembled by master watchmakers for unparalleled precision.

name: Sapphire Crystal Diver's Watch
description: Professional diving watch waterproof to 300m, featuring a luminous dial, rotating ceramic bezel, and brushed steel casing.

name: Vintage Gold Chrono
description: A nod to mid-century design, this vintage-inspired gold chronograph features a domed dial and a distressed calfskin strap.

name: Classic Leather Chelsea Boots
description: Timeless leather Chelsea boots with elasticated side panels and a stacked leather heel. Handcrafted in Spain.

name: Italian Calfskin Oxfords
description: Elegant formal oxfords meticulously crafted from polished Italian calfskin. Features a Goodyear welt construction.

name: Suede Loafers with Tassel
description: Sophisticated slip-on loafers in premium sand suede, adorned with hand-stitched tassels for a relaxed yet refined look.

name: Signature High-Top Leather Sneakers
description: Elevated streetwear. These high-top sneakers are crafted from buttery soft Napa leather with gold-tone hardware.

name: Crocodile Embossed Derby Shoes
description: Bold derby shoes featuring a stunning crocodile-embossed leather exterior, perfect for making a statement at any event.

name: Monk Strap Dress Shoes
description: Double monk strap shoes featuring hand-burnished leather and silver-tone buckles. The epitome of modern sartorial elegance.

name: Black Night Air Force 1
description: Luxurious black velvet evening slippers with a quilted silk lining and a subtle embroidered crest on the vamp.

name: Hand-Painted Leather Brogues
description: A true work of art. These leather brogues are individually hand-painted to achieve a unique patina that ages beautifully.

name: Oud Impérial Extrait de Parfum
description: A rich, mysterious fragrance built around precious agarwood (oud), warm amber, dry spices, and a touch of wild rose.

name: Santale Sauvage Eau de Cologne
description: A clean, woody fragrance highlighting creamy Australian sandalwood, green cardamom, and fresh cedarwood accords.

name: Néroli Renaissance Scent
description: Capturing the essence of the Italian Riviera. Bitter orange flower blended with citrus oils, rosemary, and white amber.

name: Velvet Rose & Damask Parfum
description: An opulent floral fragrance featuring rare Damask rose, enveloped in a dark, smoky velvet accord and spicy clove.

name: Bergamot & Leather Elixir
description: A striking contrast of bright Italian bergamot and deep, animalic leather notes. Intoxicating and deeply masculine.

name: Vanilla Bourbon Intense
description: A gourmand masterpiece with rich Madagascar vanilla, aged bourbon barrel notes, and a hint of smoked tobacco.

name: Midnight Iris Eau de Parfum
description: A powdery, elegant scent showcasing the rare Iris pallida, intertwined with violet leaves and soft musk.

name: Ambre Royale Crystal Flacon
description: The ultimate luxury statement. Warm amber and frankincense housed in a handcrafted crystal flacon with gold detailing.

name: Luxe Cashmere Trench Coat
description: Indulge in the ultimate luxury with this double-breasted trench coat crafted from 100% pure Mongolian cashmere.

name: Structured Velvet Blazer
description: Double-breasted velvet blazer featuring structured shoulders, satin peak lapels, and custom gold-finished hardware.

name: Classic Aviator Leather Jacket
description: A timeless aviator jacket constructed from thick shearling-lined leather, offering both warmth and rugged elegance.

name: Italian Silk Bomber Jacket
description: A refined take on the bomber silhouette, made entirely from heavy Italian silk with intricate tonal embroidery.

name: Tailored Wool Overcoat
description: A sharp, single-breasted overcoat tailored from premium virgin wool. The perfect top layer for any formal ensemble.

name: Quilted Down Puffer Jacket
description: High-performance luxury. Filled with responsibly sourced goose down, featuring a water-repellent shell and technical zips.

name: Suede Racer Jacket
description: A minimalist racer jacket in incredibly soft goat suede. Features a stand collar and streamlined zip closures.

name: Bespoke Tweed Sports Coat
description: Woven in Scotland, this heritage tweed sports coat boasts intricate patterns, patch pockets, and unlined construction.

name: Bifold Calfskin Wallet
description: Slim bifold wallet made from premium french calfskin. Features six card slots and a dedicated bill compartment.

name: Alligator Zip-Around Wallet
description: A statement piece crafted from genuine alligator leather. Features a secure zip-around closure and ample organization.

name: Minimalist Cardholder
description: An ultra-slim cardholder in textured saffiano leather. Perfect for carrying just the essentials in your front pocket.

name: Woven Leather Long Wallet
description: Showcasing artisanal craftsmanship with its intricate woven leather design. Includes multiple gusseted compartments.

name: Monogram Canvas Billfold
description: Iconic monogrammed coated canvas with a soft leather interior. Highly durable and instantly recognizable.

name: Epsom Leather Money Clip Wallet
description: A modern hybrid featuring a strong magnetic money clip and several exterior card slots, crafted in scratch-resistant Epsom leather.

name: Full-Grain Leather Tote Bag
description: A spacious everyday carryall in Italian full-grain pebbled leather. Features an unlined interior and a detachable zippered pouch.

name: Saddle Crossbody Bag
description: Architectural saddle-shaped bag in smooth boxcalf leather, featuring custom brass clasp closures and an adjustable strap.

name: Soft Suede Weekender Bag
description: Generously sized travel duffel in ultra-soft split suede leather. Includes reinforced base studs and a leather shoulder pad.

name: Python Top Handle Bag
description: An exquisite structured top handle bag crafted from authentic python skin. A true collector's piece with gold-plated hardware.

name: Quilted Lambskin Shoulder Bag
description: Iconic diamond-quilted lambskin shoulder bag featuring a woven chain strap and a signature turn-lock closure.

name: Micro Beaded Evening Clutch
description: Dazzling evening clutch entirely hand-embroidered with glass micro-beads and crystals. Perfect for galas and special events.

name: Bamboo Handle Woven Tote
description: A chic resort-ready tote combining tightly woven natural raffia with distinctive curved bamboo top handles.

name: Saffiano Leather Briefcase
description: The ultimate executive accessory. Slim, structured briefcase in durable saffiano leather with a dedicated laptop compartment.
